name: Motion Path Editor
description: The Motion Path Editor allows you to visually control the spatial curves (motion paths) between position keyframes in Rive, a feature that does not exist natively.

steps.args: var raw = JSON.parse(results[0]); var kfs = []; var animId = ''; if (raw.keyframes) { var entries = Object.entries(raw.keyframes); if (entries.length) animId = entries[0][0]; entries.forEach(function(e) { (e[1]||[]).forEach(function(k) { kfs.push(k); }); }); } var frames = {}; kfs.forEach(function(k) { if (k.propertyKey === 13 || k.propertyKey === 14) { var f = k.frame; if (!frames[f]) frames[f] = {}; frames[f][k.propertyKey === 13 ? 'x' : 'y'] = k; } }); var fNums = Object.keys(frames).map(Number).sort(function(a,b){return a-b}); if (fNums.length < 2) throw new Error('Select position keyframes at 2+ different frames.'); var positions = fNums.map(function(f) { var p = frames[f]; return { frame: f, x: p.x ? p.x.value : null, y: p.y ? p.y.value : null, kfXId: p.x ? p.x.keyframeId : null, kfYId: p.y ? p.y.keyframeId : null, oldInterpX: (p.x && p.x.interpolatorId && p.x.interpolatorId !== '0-0') ? p.x.interpolatorId : null, oldInterpY: (p.y && p.y.interpolatorId && p.y.interpolatorId !== '0-0') ? p.y.interpolatorId : null }; }); var existingQuery = {}; positions.forEach(function(p) { if (p.oldInterpX) existingQuery[p.oldInterpX] = [63,64,65,66]; if (p.oldInterpY) existingQuery[p.oldInterpY] = [63,64,65,66]; }); if (!Object.keys(existingQuery).length) existingQuery['0-0'] = [63]; var changes = []; fNums.forEach(function(f) { var p = frames[f]; if (p.x) changes.push({ keyframeId: p.x.keyframeId, interpolationType: 'cubic', cubicParams: { x1: 0.33, y1: 0.33, x2: 0.67, y2: 0.67 } }); if (p.y) changes.push({ keyframeId: p.y.keyframeId, interpolationType: 'cubic', cubicParams: { x1: 0.33, y1: 0.33, x2: 0.67, y2: 0.67 } }); }); setVar('animId', animId); setVar('positions', positions); setVar('existingQuery', existingQuery); setVar('cubicPayload', { modifyKeyFrames: { animationId: animId, change: changes } });
steps.label: Validate & extract positions + existing interp IDs

steps.args: var resp = JSON.parse(results[2]); var oldVals = resp.values || {}; var positions = vars.positions; function clamp(v,lo,hi){return Math.max(lo,Math.min(hi,v))} var savedCurves = []; for (var i = 0; i < positions.length - 1; i++) { var p = positions[i]; var pn = positions[i+1]; var deltaX = pn.x - p.x; var deltaY = pn.y - p.y; var curve = { cp1x: p.x + deltaX * 0.33, cp1y: p.y + deltaY * 0.33, cp2x: p.x + deltaX * 0.67, cp2y: p.y + deltaY * 0.67, x1: 0.333, x2: 0.667 }; var hasOld = false; if (p.oldInterpX && oldVals[p.oldInterpX]) { var vx = oldVals[p.oldInterpX]; curve.x1 = vx['63'] != null ? vx['63'] : 0.333; curve.x2 = vx['65'] != null ? vx['65'] : 0.667; var y1x = vx['64'] != null ? vx['64'] : 0.33; var y2x = vx['66'] != null ? vx['66'] : 0.67; if (Math.abs(deltaX) > 0.001) { curve.cp1x = p.x + y1x * deltaX; curve.cp2x = p.x + y2x * deltaX; } hasOld = true; } if (p.oldInterpY && oldVals[p.oldInterpY]) { var vy = oldVals[p.oldInterpY]; if (!hasOld) { curve.x1 = vy['63'] != null ? vy['63'] : 0.333; curve.x2 = vy['65'] != null ? vy['65'] : 0.667; } var y1y = vy['64'] != null ? vy['64'] : 0.33; var y2y = vy['66'] != null ? vy['66'] : 0.67; if (Math.abs(deltaY) > 0.001) { curve.cp1y = p.y + y1y * deltaY; curve.cp2y = p.y + y2y * deltaY; } hasOld = true; } savedCurves.push(curve); } setVar('savedCurves', savedCurves); toast(savedCurves.length + ' segment(s) — existing curves captured', 'info');
steps.label: Save existing curve data before reset

steps.args: var raw = JSON.parse(results[5]); var kfs = []; if (raw.keyframes) { Object.entries(raw.keyframes).forEach(function(e) { (e[1]||[]).forEach(function(k) { kfs.push(k); }); }); } var kfMap = {}; kfs.forEach(function(k) { kfMap[k.keyframeId] = k; }); var positions = vars.positions; var savedCurves = vars.savedCurves || []; function clamp(v,lo,hi){return Math.max(lo,Math.min(hi,v))} var combinedPV = {}; var interpMap = []; positions.forEach(function(p) { if (p.kfXId && kfMap[p.kfXId]) { p.interpX = kfMap[p.kfXId].interpolatorId || null; combinedPV[p.kfXId] = { '68': 3 }; } if (p.kfYId && kfMap[p.kfYId]) { p.interpY = kfMap[p.kfYId].interpolatorId || null; combinedPV[p.kfYId] = { '68': 3 }; } }); var existingHandles = []; var existingEasing = []; for (var i = 0; i < positions.length - 1; i++) { var p = positions[i]; var pn = positions[i+1]; var sc = savedCurves[i] || null; var deltaX = pn.x - p.x; var deltaY = pn.y - p.y; interpMap.push({ interpX: p.interpX || null, interpY: p.interpY || null, p0x: p.x, p0y: p.y, p3x: pn.x, p3y: pn.y }); if (sc) { existingHandles.push({ cp1x: sc.cp1x, cp1y: sc.cp1y, cp2x: sc.cp2x, cp2y: sc.cp2y }); var eo = clamp(Math.round((sc.x1 - 0.333) / 0.667 * 100), 0, 100); var ei = clamp(Math.round((0.667 - sc.x2) / 0.667 * 100), 0, 100); existingEasing.push({ easeOut: eo, easeIn: ei }); if (p.interpX && Math.abs(deltaX) > 0.001) { var y1x = clamp((sc.cp1x - p.x) / deltaX, -1, 1); var y2x = clamp((sc.cp2x - p.x) / deltaX, -1, 1); combinedPV[p.interpX] = { '63': sc.x1, '64': y1x, '65': sc.x2, '66': y2x }; } if (p.interpY && Math.abs(deltaY) > 0.001) { var y1y = clamp((sc.cp1y - p.y) / deltaY, -1, 1); var y2y = clamp((sc.cp2y - p.y) / deltaY, -1, 1); combinedPV[p.interpY] = { '63': sc.x1, '64': y1y, '65': sc.x2, '66': y2y }; } } else { existingHandles.push({ cp1x: p.x + deltaX * 0.33, cp1y: p.y + deltaY * 0.33, cp2x: p.x + deltaX * 0.67, cp2y: p.y + deltaY * 0.67 }); existingEasing.push({ easeOut: 0, easeIn: 0 }); } } var kfEasing = []; for (var k = 0; k < positions.length; k++) { var eo2 = 0; var ei2 = 0; if (k < existingEasing.length) eo2 = existingEasing[k].easeOut; if (k > 0 && k - 1 < existingEasing.length) ei2 = existingEasing[k - 1].easeIn; kfEasing.push({ easeOut: eo2, easeIn: ei2 }); } setVar('positions', positions); setVar('combinedPV', combinedPV); localStorage.setItem('_mpPositions', JSON.stringify(positions)); localStorage.setItem('_mpInterpMap', JSON.stringify(interpMap)); localStorage.setItem('_mpHandles', JSON.stringify(existingHandles)); localStorage.setItem('_mpKfEasing', JSON.stringify(kfEasing)); toast('Restoring curves...', 'info');
steps.label: Map new IDs, prepare switch + restore payload
Switch to cubicValue & restore existing curves

ui.title: Motion Path Editor
ui.html:
Frame 1
Ease Out%
Ease In%
Click a keyframe point to edit its easing

steps.args: var positions = vars.positions; var segData = localStorage.getItem('_mpHandles'); if (!segData) throw new Error('No curve data. Drag handles then click Continue.'); var segments = JSON.parse(segData); if (!segments || !segments.length) throw new Error('No curve data from editor.'); var kfEasingData = localStorage.getItem('_mpKfEasing'); var kfEasing = kfEasingData ? JSON.parse(kfEasingData) : []; function clamp(v,lo,hi){return Math.max(lo,Math.min(hi,v))} function segEasing(si){var eo=(kfEasing[si]?kfEasing[si].easeOut:0)/100;var ei=(kfEasing[si+1]?kfEasing[si+1].easeIn:0)/100;return{x1:clamp(0.333+eo*0.667,0.05,0.95),x2:clamp(0.667-ei*0.667,0.05,0.95)}} var payload = {}; for (var i = 0; i < segments.length && i < positions.length - 1; i++) { var seg = segments[i]; var e = segEasing(i); var p0x = positions[i].x; var p0y = positions[i].y; var p3x = positions[i+1].x; var p3y = positions[i+1].y; var deltaX = p3x - p0x; var deltaY = p3y - p0y; var interpX = positions[i].interpX; var interpY = positions[i].interpY; if (interpX && Math.abs(deltaX) > 0.001) { var y1x = clamp((seg.cp1x - p0x) / deltaX, -1, 1); var y2x = clamp((seg.cp2x - p0x) / deltaX, -1, 1); payload[interpX] = { '63': e.x1, '64': y1x, '65': e.x2, '66': y2x }; } if (interpY && Math.abs(deltaY) > 0.001) { var y1y = clamp((seg.cp1y - p0y) / deltaY, -1, 1); var y2y = clamp((seg.cp2y - p0y) / deltaY, -1, 1); payload[interpY] = { '63': e.x1, '64': y1y, '65': e.x2, '66': y2y }; } } var count = Object.keys(payload).length; if (count === 0) throw new Error('No valid interpolators to update.'); toast('Applying to ' + count + ' interpolators...', 'info'); setVar('curvePayload', payload);
steps.label: Convert handles to curve params

helpGuide:
Motion Path Editor — Select 2+ position keyframes in Rive's timeline, then run the script.

Drag colored handles to shape the spatial curve between keyframes
Click a white keyframe dot to select it and reveal easing sliders
Drag on empty space to marquee-select multiple keyframes
Ease Out = how much the object decelerates leaving that keyframe
Ease In = how much the object decelerates arriving at that keyframe
Ease All 75% = quick smooth preset for all keyframes
Reset Path = straight lines + linear easing
Alt + clic to drive bezier in mirror
Changes apply live on handle release; click Continue to finalize
